title: Squirrel Removal in Riverdale, Bronx | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Riverdale, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving North Riverdale & Fieldston. Call for free estimate!
intro: Squirrels in Riverdale's tree-lined neighborhoods often find their way into attics, chimneys, and soffits of the area's beautiful homes. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Riverdale, from Fieldston's historic estates to the apartment buildings along the Hudson River. Our humane trapping and exclusion methods protect your property while safely removing these persistent pests.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Riverdale's unique mix of single-family homes and pre-war buildings, we understand the specific squirrel challenges facing this leafy Bronx neighborhood. Our technicians are experienced in working with Riverdale's diverse architecture, from Tudor-style homes to co-ops, ensuring effective removal without damaging your property's character.
localContext: Riverdale's proximity to Van Cortlandt Park and Wave Hill, combined with mature oak and maple trees throughout the neighborhood, creates ideal habitat for gray squirrels. The area's historic homes in Fieldston and along Independence Avenue are particularly vulnerable to squirrel intrusions through roof vents, gable ends, and chimney caps.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Riverdale?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Riverdale typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic remediation is needed. Larger Fieldston estates or properties with extensive damage may be at the higher end, while single-entry situations in apartments cost less. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Riverdale?
faqs.answer: Riverdale's abundant tree canopy, proximity to Van Cortlandt Park, and mix of older homes with architectural features like decorative eaves and unscreened vents make it prime squirrel territory. The neighborhood's gray squirrels are particularly active in fall and spring when they seek warm nesting sites in attics and chimneys.

faqs.question: How do you remove squirrels humanely in Riverdale?
faqs.answer: We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter your Riverdale home. After all squirrels are removed, we seal entry points with heavy-duty materials matched to your home's exterior. We never use poisons and follow all NYC wildlife regulations to ensure humane treatment.

faqs.question: Can squirrels damage my Riverdale home?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to Riverdale homes by chewing through wooden soffits, roof shingles, and electrical wiring. They compress insulation, create fire hazards, and leave droppings that can harbor diseases. Many of Riverdale's historic homes have intricate woodwork that squirrels can damage, making prompt removal essential to preserve your property's value and integrity.
